message: fire_start_frame=80 maps to Feb (1.7 months) — Cerrado fires peak Aug–Sep (late dry season)
detail: Pivello (2011): natural/anthropogenic fires in Cerrado peak Aug-Sep. Suggested frames: 280–420 (Jul–Sep).

message: Arara-caninde.lifespan_base (500) ≤ Gado-Nelore.lifespan_base (800) — real Arara-caninde lives longer than Gado-Nelore
detail: Hyacinth Macaw 50–60 yrs vs Nelore cattle 15–20 yrs. [Sick 1997 / ABCZ 2021]

message: Urubu-rei.lifespan_base (400) ≤ Gado-Nelore.lifespan_base (800) — real Urubu-rei lives longer than Gado-Nelore
detail: King Vulture 30–40 yrs vs Nelore cattle 15–20 yrs. [BirdLife 2023]

message: migration_start_frame=40 maps to Jan (0.9 months) — migrants arrive Sep–Oct or depart Mar–Apr
detail: Alves et al. (2004): Cerrado migratory birds arrive at wet season onset (Sep-Oct) and depart at wet season end (Mar-Apr).
